gaps.question: What are the performance SLAs? Are there response time requirements for document processing or LLM generation?
What is the maximum total document size allowed per project? Is there a limit on the number of documents?
Are there data retention policies for uploaded documents and generated specs? Should documents be deletable?
Should the system support exporting User Stories directly to Jira via API integration?
What error handling UX is expected when the LLM service is unavailable? Should the user see a retry option?
